text:
is a Survey Corps soldier and former member of the 104th Training Corps.

Appearance

Historia has long blonde hair tied into a ponytail with hair on the sides. She has large eyes and is seen wearing the 104th Training Corps uniform. Off-duty, she wears a white dress shirt and a black skirt.
